comment: Paste this into Leakd's Bulk Import (Settings → Bulk import → paste text) before taking screenshots. Gives a realistic-looking demo with 8 subscriptions across categories. Total monthly: $147.95

screenshotPlan.title: Home view — 'See where your money leaks'
screenshotPlan.instructions: Bulk-import the 8 services. Wait for animation to settle. Screenshot the Home tab. The $147.95/mo number with sparkline + forecast widget + sub list should all be visible.

screenshotPlan.title: Insights — Donut + ratio
screenshotPlan.instructions: Tap Insights tab. Settings → Income & ratio → set $3000. Reopen Insights. Screenshot showing YTD hero + donut chart + income ratio (4.9% — 'Healthy').

screenshotPlan.title: Lifetime cost — 'Netflix has cost you $179.86 — would be $2,596 invested'
screenshotPlan.instructions: Tap on Netflix in the list. Wait for Lifetime Cost card to render. Screenshot the modal showing 'You've paid $179.86' + green 'If you invested instead' card.

screenshotPlan.title: Calendar view — 'See every renewal at a glance'
screenshotPlan.instructions: Insights tab → scroll to Renewal calendar card. Screenshot the month grid with red dots on renewal days.

screenshotPlan.title: Cancellation playbook — 'We tell you exactly how to cancel'
screenshotPlan.instructions: Tap on Adobe CC in the list. Scroll to the Playbook card. Screenshot showing the red 'Hard' difficulty badge + 5 cancellation steps.

screenshotPlan.title: Smart suggestions — 'We spot what you'd miss'
screenshotPlan.instructions: Insights tab → scroll to Smart suggestions. Screenshot showing the 3 suggestion cards (yearly billing, duplicates, etc.).

screenshotPlan.title: 16 languages — 'Speaks your language. Literally.'
screenshotPlan.instructions: Settings → Language. Screenshot the language picker showing all 16 flags + names.

screenshotPlan.title: Cancelled subs — 'Celebrate your wins'
screenshotPlan.instructions: Mark 2-3 subs as cancelled (Edit → Mark as cancelled). Settings → Cancelled subscriptions. Screenshot the green hero showing total monthly savings.
